subcodes.first_line: O My loved ones! Adorn ye your tongues with truthfulness, your hands with generosity, your bodies with dignity, and your souls [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا احبائی زینوا لسانکم بالصدق و یدکم بالکرم و اجسادکم بالوقار و انفسکم
subcodes.subjects: @characteristics and conduct of true believers, @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life, @honesty; truthfulness; trustworthiness, @generosity [kirama], @courtesy; culture [adab], @love of God, @piety; righteousness; fear of God [taqwa]
